issues.description: Card has official effect text but DSL effects array is empty. Missing two effects: (1) Rest all of your DON!! cards as active, (2) Apply restriction preventing card plays from hand during this turn
Missing effect to set DON!! cards as active (Rest action on player's DON cards)
Missing duration-limited restriction effect for 'cannot play cards from your hand during this turn' — requires DuringYourTurn duration
